checks.description: Mutual exclusion: rise and down must never be asserted simultaneously in the same clock cycle.
checks.pass_condition: For every observed clock edge, the conjunction (rise && down) is false. Any cycle where both are 1 violates the property.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever a transition on input a is detected.

checks.description: Edge pulse width: after a rising edge on a, rise must be 1 for exactly one clock cycle and then return to 0; similarly for a falling edge and down.
checks.pass_condition: If a transitions 0→1, then on the next rising edge of clk rise == 1 and on the following edge rise == 0. If a transitions 1→0, then on the next rising edge of clk down == 1 and on the following edge down == 0. No other cycles may assert the same pulse without a new transition.
checks.trigger_condition: When a change on input a is observed.
